scope: exploratory DEV diagnosis only; cannot reclassify Stage B or authorize Stage C

source_allowlist.runtime_gate: hash and authorization closure must validate before any physics read

input_bindings.physics_path_rule: for each exact manifest execution.world_ids entry W, open only results/INTERVENTIONAL-INDIVIDUALITY-00-STAGE-B-DEV/W/physics.npz

accepted_parent_physics_git_tree.record_encoding: path<TAB>git_blob_oid, sorted by path, LF separated with terminal LF
accepted_parent_physics_git_tree.runtime_gate: the accepted-parent tree must reproduce this aggregate and every worktree physics file must hash to its corresponding accepted-parent Git blob before NumPy loads any array

forbidden_inputs: any result outside the exact Stage-B DEV root
any checkpoint, seed, initialized world or selected-world list

population.pairing_use: nominal index-aligned soup-minus-compact differences only; the manifest does not establish matched random numbers, so these are not statistical pairs and support no paired inferential test or causal IC contrast

frozen_manifest_values.candidate_region_rule: at least 2 of 4 candidate worlds separately in soup and compact; retained only for exact reproduction and never revised

required_physics_arrays.exact_layout_gate: the complete key inventory, dtypes, shapes, clock, reference-error scale calculation and exact neutral/zero gates are normative in INTERVENTIONAL_INDIVIDUALITY_00_STAGE_B_AUTOPSY_RECONSTRUCTION_PROTOCOL.json; any mismatch is AUDIT_INVALID

independent_stage_b_reconstruction.component_detection: m>=0.5, periodic four-neighbour connectivity, minimum 3 cells, deterministic row-major roots and LIFO traversal; retain mass-weighted lifted centroid, radius and winding flags
independent_stage_b_reconstruction.association: exact raw/dilated IoU, periodic centroid distance, area ratio and frozen score; select raw overlaps, then unique mutual best only; retain ambiguity
independent_stage_b_reconstruction.tracking: explicit continuation, split, merge, appearance, dissolution and unresolved many-to-many/collapse; no outcome, tracer, bond or activity term enters association
independent_stage_b_reconstruction.cohort: initialize q=m on each track's first component and advect q with stored gross directional matter flows; require q conservation and 0<=q<=m
independent_stage_b_reconstruction.track_summary: recompute observed/span frames, maximum area, bounded/percolated fractions, mean internal activity and energy throughput, maximum turnover, post-turnover frames and unresolved status
independent_stage_b_reconstruction.world_classifier: apply the exact frozen nine-class precedence and candidate-region aggregation
independent_stage_b_reconstruction.audit_gate: reconstructed canonical 64-world classification must be byte-identical to the committed classification or outcome AUDIT_INVALID

lineage_and_world_aggregation.no_cross_track_stitching: bounded activity, persistence, turnover, post-turnover survival and candidate status must be evaluated on one reconstructed track at a time; milestones from different tracks may never be combined into one developmental progression

ordered_same_track_milestones.t_active: first instantaneous_bounded_active observation on that track
ordered_same_track_milestones.t_persistence: first persistence_qualification prefix on that track; descriptive and not substituted across tracks
ordered_same_track_milestones.t_turn: first turnover_fraction>=0.6 observation on that same track at or after t_active
ordered_same_track_milestones.t_prefix_candidate: first prefix_candidate observation on that same track at or after t_turn

lineage_and_world_aggregation.world_formation_failure: FORMATION_FAILURE only when no track/component exists
lineage_and_world_aggregation.world_primary_pathway: otherwise take the maximum track pathway rank achieved using ordered_same_track_milestones; retain the full set of co-primary tracks
lineage_and_world_aggregation.reporting_representative: for a noncandidate world choose the minimum (onset_frame, ascending row-major onset-support tuple) among co-primary tracks; for a committed candidate world use candidate_world_episode below
lineage_and_world_aggregation.world_first_times: separate descriptive minima over eligible single-track events; each output also records the originating track fingerprint, and these minima are never presented as one lineage
lineage_and_world_aggregation.candidate_world_episode: take the longest prefix-candidate episode on any independently reconstructed final-candidate track in the world; break equal-length ties by earlier episode onset then minimum (onset_frame, ascending row-major onset-support tuple); this track is the candidate-world reporting representative; retain every candidate-track episode in track_observations
lineage_and_world_aggregation.candidate_episode_terminal: episode end frame equals the last observed frame of the same originating track; when no episode exists the flag is false and candidate_status_frames,candidate_episode_count,longest_candidate_episode_frames are integer zero; track end at frame 159 is administrative censoring, not dissolution
lineage_and_world_aggregation.candidate_world_fields: for every world, candidate_status_frames is the count of prefix_candidate=true observations on its deterministic reporting representative, and candidate_episode_count/longest_candidate_episode_frames are the count/maximum consecutive-run length on that same representative; committed candidate worlds use candidate_world_episode selection, all other worlds use reporting_representative, and values are never summed or unioned across tracks
lineage_and_world_aggregation.world_scope_fields: last_detected_frame is the maximum detector frame containing any world component; split_count,merge_count,appearance_count,dissolution_count are world totals of those lifecycle event types; coordinate_seam_crossed and ever_wound are world-any flags
lineage_and_world_aggregation.candidate_ids_gate: after reconstruction, the exact set of candidate track IDs per world must equal the committed candidate_track_ids; the IDs are reporting labels assigned downstream of association and never enter scoring

per_observation_metrics.matter_in_out: dt times gross directional matter crossings on component boundary, split exactly into incoming and outgoing
per_observation_metrics.resource_natural_exchange_per_mass: dt*math.fsum(abs(resource_natural) over component boundary)/mass; no other resource channel is included or implied
per_observation_metrics.mean_internal_bond: mean b over internal component faces; zero when no internal face
per_observation_metrics.internal_bond_saturation_fraction: fraction of internal faces with b>=0.9; zero when no internal face
per_observation_metrics.matter_cv: population standard deviation of support m divided by support mean; zero only for zero mean
per_observation_metrics.resource_cv: population standard deviation of support n divided by support mean; zero only for zero mean
per_observation_metrics.seam_diagnostics: record minimum support-cell distance to either coordinate seam and coordinate-seam crossing separately from true winding; both seam measures are coordinate-dependent and never a boundary mechanism

event_definitions.formation: first detector frame with at least one component
event_definitions.instantaneous_bounded_active: nonpercolated observation with area_fraction<=0.25, activity_per_mass>=0.0001 and energy_throughput_per_mass>=0.00001
event_definitions.persistence_qualification: first prefix observation at which one resolved track has both observed_frames>=80 and span_frames>=80
event_definitions.prefix_candidate: at frame t, the exact frozen candidate gates recomputed on that track's observations from onset through t, including >=80 observed/span frames, maximum area<=0.25, bounded fraction>=0.95, zero percolated fraction, mean activity/energy minima, maximum turnover>=0.6 and >=32 observations strictly after first turnover
event_definitions.stable_candidate_episode: longest candidate episode >=32 frames and includes the track's terminal observation
event_definitions.terminal_empty_run_start: first frame of the final all-empty suffix; null if the last detector frame is nonempty
event_definitions.terminal_freeze_onset: first frame of a final run of at least 32 observations on a track alive at frame 159 with both activity and energy below their frozen minima
event_definitions.right_censored: at least one resolved track/component remains observed at frame 159; this flags finite-horizon truncation but does not imply eventual success

primary_track_terminal_state.EMPTY_OR_DISSOLVED: the deterministic reporting representative has an explicit DISSOLUTION event before frame 159
primary_track_terminal_state.FROZEN: the representative reaches frame 159 and its maximal consecutive terminal suffix in which every observation has activity<0.0001 AND energy<0.00001 has length>=32
primary_track_terminal_state.PERSISTENT_ACTIVE: the representative reaches frame 159, is not FROZEN, has at least 32 consecutive terminal observations, and both exact last-32 math.fsum means meet their frozen minima
primary_track_terminal_state.PERSISTENT_OTHER: the representative reaches frame 159 but meets neither FROZEN nor PERSISTENT_ACTIVE; a pre-horizon track end without an explicit DISSOLUTION is an audit failure

event_definitions.terminal_loss_for_destructive_signature: a tracked component has an observed DISSOLUTION event before frame 159 after its longest candidate episode; administrative track end at frame 159 is not loss

developmental_pathway_order.label: ACTIVATION_FAILURE
developmental_pathway_order.condition: tracks formed but no single track has t_active

developmental_pathway_order.label: TURNOVER_FAILURE
developmental_pathway_order.condition: at least one track has t_active but no single track has t_turn at or after its own t_active

developmental_pathway_order.label: PERSISTENCE_FAILURE
developmental_pathway_order.condition: at least one single track has ordered t_active then t_turn but no such track has a later t_prefix_candidate

developmental_pathway_order.label: TRANSIENT_CANDIDATE_CROSSING
developmental_pathway_order.condition: at least one single track has ordered t_active,t_turn,t_prefix_candidate but no such track has stable_candidate_episode

developmental_pathway_order.label: STABLE_CANDIDATE_EPISODE
developmental_pathway_order.condition: at least one single track has ordered t_active,t_turn,t_prefix_candidate and stable_candidate_episode

trajectory_outputs.track_observation_rows: one row for every reconstructed resolved/unresolved track observation with all per-observation metrics and prefix gate terms
trajectory_outputs.event_rows: one ASSOCIATION_DIAGNOSTICS row per adjacent-frame transition preserving every pair edge, plus all appearance, continuation, split, merge, dissolution, temporary-contact and unresolved lifecycle events
trajectory_outputs.ic_law_atlas: counts and median/min/max summaries computed from original-world rows; no selected subset
trajectory_outputs.ic_region_summary: law-stratified unpaired soup-versus-compact counts and median/min/max original-world summaries; print both numerators and denominators, with no p-values or confidence intervals
trajectory_outputs.candidate_summary: all 11 committed candidate worlds retained together; no law/world promotion

candidate_coherence_rule.trajectory_class: developmental pathway + representative-track terminal state + early/middle/late frozen bin of the deterministic reporting representative track onset frame + any world split/merge + world right-censoring flag
candidate_coherence_rule.coherent: at least 9 of the 11 committed candidate worlds share one exact trajectory_class
candidate_coherence_rule.transient_majority: at least 6 of 11 committed candidate worlds have brief_candidate_episode or candidate_episode_terminal=false

mechanism_signatures.semantics: all entries are observational signatures consistent with a developmental mechanism, never causal identification; they may justify only a fresh pre-data design

window_contract.first_16_post_formation: the representative track's first 16 observations including its onset observation
window_contract.final_8_pre_freeze: the representative frozen track's eight consecutive observations immediately preceding terminal_freeze_onset, strictly excluding that onset
window_contract.strictly_pre_candidate_baseline: all representative candidate-track observations from track onset through one frame before the selected longest candidate episode begins; require at least one observation and a positive median
window_contract.candidate_episode_values: all observations inside the selected longest candidate episode on the representative candidate track
window_contract.candidate_status_touches_159: the representative candidate track has prefix_candidate=true at detector frame 159; world-any or another candidate track does not substitute
window_contract.unavailable: an incomplete required window, empty baseline or nonpositive required baseline is unavailable rather than false or excluded

mechanism_signatures.IC_FORMATION_DEPENDENCE: aggregate soup-minus-compact formation fraction magnitude>=0.25 and the same nonzero direction with magnitude>=0.25 in at least 6 of 8 laws

COMPACT_PREMATURE_FREEZE.gate: compact-minus-soup terminal-freeze fraction>=0.25 in the same direction in at least 6 of 8 laws

candidate_precursors.BOND_SATURATION: on the same representative frozen track in at least ceil(0.75*N) of all N compact frozen worlds, internal_bond_saturation_fraction first reaches >=0.5 at least 8 frames before terminal_freeze_onset
candidate_precursors.LOW_INTERNAL_HETEROGENEITY: on the same representative frozen track in at least ceil(0.75*N) of all N compact frozen worlds, both matter_cv<0.05 and resource_cv<0.05 hold for 8 consecutive observations ending before terminal_freeze_onset
candidate_precursors.REDUCED_MATERIAL_EXCHANGE: on the same representative frozen track in at least ceil(0.75*N) of all N compact frozen worlds, the final 8 pre-freeze observations have median matter_exchange_per_mass <=0.25 times the positive first-16-post-formation baseline median

COMPACT_PREMATURE_FREEZE.denominator_and_availability: N is every compact frozen world and N=0 makes every precursor false; insufficient 16/8-frame history or nonpositive baseline makes the predeclared diagnostic unavailable, never an exclusion, and routes the terminal outcome to RAW_INSUFFICIENT unless an earlier outcome branch applies
COMPACT_PREMATURE_FREEZE.qualification: the gate is true and exactly one candidate precursor is true; low activity/energy during the terminal freeze window is an outcome definition and cannot qualify as a precursor
COMPACT_PREMATURE_FREEZE.raw_limit: the precursor is a temporal descriptive signature, not proof of dynamical cause

DESTRUCTIVE_TRANSITION_PROXIMITY.DISSOLUTION_SUBTYPE: at least 9 of 11 candidate worlds end their selected candidate episode no more than 32 frames before a subsequently observed DISSOLUTION event on that same track before frame 159
DESTRUCTIVE_TRANSITION_PROXIMITY.HIGH_EXCHANGE_SUBTYPE: at least 9 of all 11 committed candidate worlds have a positive strictly pre-candidate same-track exchange median and median candidate-episode matter_exchange_per_mass at least twice that baseline
DESTRUCTIVE_TRANSITION_PROXIMITY.qualification: exactly one subtype qualifies, or both qualify in the same at least 9 candidate worlds; a mixture of different worlds satisfying different clauses does not qualify
DESTRUCTIVE_TRANSITION_PROXIMITY.censoring_rule: frame-159 administrative track termination never satisfies DISSOLUTION_SUBTYPE
DESTRUCTIVE_TRANSITION_PROXIMITY.availability: missing same-track baseline history in any candidate is diagnostic unavailability, not exclusion, and routes to RAW_INSUFFICIENT unless an earlier outcome branch applies

mechanism_signatures.FINITE_HORIZON_CENSORING: at least 9 of 11 candidate worlds are right-censored with candidate status touching frame 159, and the same pattern occurs in candidate worlds across at least 4 distinct laws
mechanism_signatures.TRANSIENT_THRESHOLD_CROSSING: transient_majority under the frozen candidate-coherence rule

actionability_rule.ACTIONABLE_DEVELOPMENTAL_HYPOTHESIS: audit valid, candidate coherence true, exactly one eligible mechanism signature true, that signature spans at least 4 laws, and no required diagnostic is missing
actionability_rule.TRANSIENT_OR_HETEROGENEOUS_CANDIDATES: audit valid, required diagnostics are available, candidates exist, and transient majority is true or candidate coherence is false
actionability_rule.RAW_INSUFFICIENT: audit valid and all frozen required arrays are present, but the persisted observables leave candidates coherent/nontransient with zero or multiple eligible mechanism signatures, or otherwise leave the named mechanisms observationally equivalent
decision_algorithm: RAW_INSUFFICIENT when candidate-duration or candidate-coherence diagnostics required for the transient branch are unavailable despite valid frozen raw
TRANSIENT_OR_HETEROGENEOUS_CANDIDATES when transient_majority is true or candidate coherence is false
RAW_INSUFFICIENT when any predeclared mechanism or censoring diagnostic required to evaluate actionability is unavailable
ACTIONABLE_DEVELOPMENTAL_HYPOTHESIS when exactly one eligible mechanism qualifies and all its remaining gates pass
actionability_rule.immutable_note: none of these outcomes changes DEV_FEASIBILITY_FAIL

formation_maintenance_estimands.A_formation: for each law and IC, descriptive count/fraction of the 4 original worlds forming any component by each frame and by frame 159
formation_maintenance_estimands.B_conditional_maintenance_world: among original worlds that formed at least one component, descriptive world-level conditional counts in which at least one single track reached bounded activity, persistence, turnover, prefix candidate, stable episode and terminal persistence; stages are never stitched across tracks
formation_maintenance_estimands.B_conditional_maintenance_track: a separately labelled complete track-level funnel with one row per track; it is diagnostic and never substituted for the original-world denominator

opportunity_flags.formation_opportunity: true for every one of the 64 complete horizon worlds
opportunity_flags.maintenance_opportunity: true when any component formed; this is the denominator flag for B_conditional_maintenance_world
opportunity_flags.persistence_horizon_opportunity: true when at least one track onset is no later than frame 80, permitting 80 observations by frame 159
opportunity_flags.post_turnover_horizon_opportunity: true when at least one single track reaches turnover no later than frame 127, permitting 32 strictly later observations

formation_maintenance_estimands.interpretation: A and B use different denominators; Stage B's unconditional region gate combines both. The decomposition may motivate only a fresh pre-data design and never rescues Stage B.
formation_maintenance_estimands.precision_warning: four replicates per law/IC are not a precise probability estimate

planned_outputs.write_policy: exclusive new files, no overwrite, no retry/replacement; canonical finite JSON with terminal LF

integrity.json.counts: exactly 67 input rows: manifest, root manifest, committed classification and 64 physics shards

world_transitions.json.world_row_keys: exactly world_transition_fields in that declared order before canonical key sorting
world_transitions.json.milestone_track_fingerprint_values: canonical fingerprint string of the track producing the corresponding world-minimum descriptive milestone, tie-broken by minimum fingerprint; null when the milestone does not occur

track_observations.jsonl.order: world order, canonical track order, frame

events.jsonl.diagnostic_row: exactly one ASSOCIATION_DIAGNOSTICS row for every frame 1..159; frame is the target frame, source/target IDs and keys list all transition nodes, association_edges lists every Cartesian source-target pair sorted by source then target

payload_contracts.ASSOCIATION_DIAGNOSTICS: one row per target frame 1..159; all source and target track IDs/component keys in component-index order; resolved iff the transition has no ambiguity/collapse/unresolved group; association_edges is the full sorted Cartesian pair inventory
payload_contracts.APPEARANCE: one row for each frame-0 component and each later unsupported target component; empty source arrays, one target ID/key, resolved=true, association_edges=[]
payload_contracts.CONTINUATION: one row per resolved 1-to-1 group; one source and one target ID/key, resolved=true, association_edges=[]
payload_contracts.DISSOLUTION: one row per unsupported source component at the target transition frame; one source ID/key, empty target arrays, resolved=true, association_edges=[]
payload_contracts.SPLIT: one row per resolved 1-to-many group; one source ID/key, target IDs/keys in ascending target component index, resolved=true, association_edges=[]
payload_contracts.MERGE: one row per resolved many-to-1 group; sources in ascending source component index with corresponding IDs, one target ID/key, resolved=true, association_edges=[]
payload_contracts.TEMPORARY_CONTACT: one row per unordered resolved target-component pair, pair ordered by ascending component index, empty source arrays, two target IDs/keys, resolved=true, association_edges=[]
payload_contracts.TRACKING_UNRESOLVED: one row per unresolved connected group; sources and targets in ascending component index with corresponding IDs, resolved=false, association_edges=[]

events.jsonl.frame_contract: frame 0 only has initial APPEARANCE rows; every transition lifecycle event is timestamped at its target frame; no administrative DISSOLUTION is emitted after frame 159
events.jsonl.order: world order, frame, event_types order above, source component keys, target component keys

trajectory_atlas.json.nominal_index_difference_rule: soup minus compact when both values are nonnull, otherwise null; statistically_matched is always false; rows ordered law then replicate and never enter a decision
trajectory_atlas.json.summary_rule: every count prints numerator and denominator; every continuous summary prints n,median,min,max; a zero denominator yields null fraction/summary
trajectory_atlas.json.nominal_index_alignment: law+replicate rows are included only to satisfy descriptive alignment; explicitly not matched pairs and excluded from all decision signatures

analysis.json.signature_interpretation: a fixed string of the form OBSERVATIONAL_SIGNATURE_ONLY:<signature_name>; never causal and never changes DEV_FEASIBILITY_FAIL
analysis.json.signature_availability: object with exactly signature_names boolean keys plus unavailable_reasons string array
analysis.json.gate_conflation_note_literal: Stage B's unconditional region gate combined formation probability from a neutral IC with maintenance and turnover conditional on formation; this decomposition cannot reclassify or rescue Stage B.
analysis.json.outcome: exactly one authorized autopsy outcome; immutable_stage_b_disposition remains DEV_FEASIBILITY_FAIL

COMPLETE.json.file_inventory: the seven preceding output files only, sorted by path; COMPLETE excludes itself

QUALIFICATION.json.publication: created exclusively only after both final roots exist and all eight files are byte-identical; never updates either root

serialization_and_publication.json: UTF-8, sorted object keys, separators comma/colon without spaces, ensure_ascii=false, allow_nan=false, terminal LF; undefined values are JSON null and frames/counts are integers
serialization_and_publication.jsonl: one canonical JSON object per line in declared row order, terminal LF, no blank lines
serialization_and_publication.numeric: float64 inputs only; coordinate/face/track rows are canonically sorted before math.fsum reductions; nonfinite values fail the audit; negative zero is normalized to positive zero before serialization
serialization_and_publication.row_order: worlds in manifest execution.world_ids order; tracks by onset frame then canonical onset-support fingerprint; observations by frame; events by frame/type/canonical support fingerprint
serialization_and_publication.publication: require both final root and absent sibling root final+'.partial' absent; create the sibling partial directory exclusively, write the closed file inventory there with COMPLETE.json last, fsync and then atomically rename the whole sibling directory to the absent final root; never retry, repair or replace a partial/final root

runtime_environment.gate: the analyzer and independent reproducer refuse any mismatch; no scientific package or engine is imported

firewall_enforcement.path_normalization: resolve without following an unauthorized target, reject '..', symlinks and Windows reparse points, convert separators to '/', casefold, and require exact membership in the casefolded allowlist
firewall_enforcement.read_api: all scientific file reads pass through one allowlist guard; direct open/numpy.load outside that guard is forbidden
firewall_enforcement.git_metadata_exception: read-only accepted-parent tree/blob metadata is allowed only to authenticate the 64 allowlisted physics paths

synthetic_before_raw: zero denominator and zero baseline fixtures
all four outcome truth-table branches plus RAW_INSUFFICIENT default
malicious NPZ duplicate-member, nested-name, traversal-name, extra-key, object-dtype and structured-dtype rejection fixtures
post_raw: world labels byte-identical to committed classification
candidate set exactly the committed 11 worlds
all eight files in the primary and independently implemented output roots are pairwise byte-identical and sealed by QUALIFICATION.json

prohibitions: no world initialization, seed, LawSpec or checkpoint reconstruction
no threshold revision, selected subset, new family or retry
no causal cut, conductance, memory, ownership or individuality claim
no Stage C, prospective seal, merge or PR
